---
title: "Getting Started"
format: 
  html: default
  revealjs:
    output-file: getting-started-revealjs.html
  docx: default
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(rpt)
```

```{r load-macros, results='asis', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
macros_lines <- readLines("../../macros/macros.qmd")
macros_lines <- gsub("<!--.*?-->", "", macros_lines, perl = TRUE)
macros_lines <- macros_lines[nzchar(trimws(macros_lines))]
cat("$$\n", paste(macros_lines, collapse = "\n"), "\n$$\n", sep = "")
```

## Introduction

This vignette provides an introduction to the `{rpt}` package.

## Basic Usage

Here's a basic example:

```{r}
# Example usage
example_function(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5))
```

## Next Steps

For more information, see the package documentation.
